name: stringbean
description: Use Stringbean's sbx orchestrator from inside Codex.

interface.longDescription: Adds an explicit-only Codex skill and typed local tools for starting a versioned Stringbean sbx runtime, polling visible progress, and reporting the final sentinel result without model-issued shell escalation.
defaultPrompt: Use Stringbean sbx for this task.
Delegate this through sbx and summarize the result.
Run sbx in rw mode for this implementation.
